idea-plugin.name: velk
idea-plugin.description:
Open the velk terminal AI harness in a JetBrains terminal panel.

Tools → velk: Open REPL (or Ctrl/Cmd-Shift-A → "velk") spawns a terminal running the velk binary in the project's working directory.

Configure the binary path under Settings → Tools → velk if velk is not on PATH.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.0.1

  • Initial release. velk: Open REPL action launches the velk binary in a JetBrains terminal panel.
  • Configurable binary path + extra args.

action.description: Open the velk terminal AI harness in a terminal panel.
